evidence_direction_note: SUPERSEDED 2026-04-23 by V3-EXQ-397d (matched-endpoint metric redesign). Root cause analysis (2026-04-23): the terrain-training fix IS correctly wired into the loss (F.mse_loss(ao_mean_pred, best_ao.detach()).backward() on hippocampal.terrain_prior + action_object_decoder; input distribution matches between training and inference, both using theta_buffer.summary()). terrain_loss 0.34 -> 3e-6 is self-referential distribution collapse: training target is the min-residue candidate from a CEM pool seeded by terrain_prior itself. The metric (mean_random - mean_hippo trajectory residue) is confounded in resource-hazard-colocated envs: residue RBFs accumulate at cells visited during harm (goal-adjacent by env design), so hippo trajectories correctly projecting toward goals TRAVERSE residue-dense regions while random E2 rollouts wander near the current (residue-sparse) z_world. Negative hippo_quality_gap reflects goal-seeking, not harm-seeking. ARC-007 behavioural evidence remains via EXQ-114 (99.2% harm reduction MAP_NAV vs MAP_ABLATED).
